## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to align on client priorities, deliverables, and task assignments for the upcoming week.](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritize GetPod deliverables for end of day, focusing on competitive research and Airtable setup](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Aida to lead communication for Engine, Town, and Pod; Jo to support and gradually take on more responsibility](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [New approach: Create high-quality, client-ready deliverables in Notion; avoid sharing incomplete or embarrassing content](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
  - [Streamlined kickoff process: Limit attendees to reduce overwhelming clients and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

## Topics

### Client Priorities and Assignments

  - [GetPod: Highest priority; needs competitive research, Airtable setup, and strategy communication by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Engine: In good shape; focus on refining topic clusters and tagging assignments](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Town: Kickoff prep; focus on understanding brand and SMB-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Biologica: VIP client; requires careful, high-quality content preparation](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [Hypergrowth: Custom workflows focus; less prep needed, more about understanding use cases](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)

### Notion Space and Deliverable Quality

  - [Aim to create benchmark-quality Notion spaces for Engine and Town over next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2959.0)
  - [Ensure all client-visible content is polished, insightful, and embarrassment-free](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2694.0)
  - [Focus on creating useful, detailed competitive research (e.g., 50+ competitors with screenshots and key metrics)](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2829.0)

### Airtable Workflow and Assignment Creation

  - [Use CSV import extension for efficient data importing and field mapping](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=3801.0)
  - [Create status fields (e.g., backlog, considering, approved) to track assignment progress](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=4098.0)

### Team Roles and Communication

  - [Aida to lead on Engine, Town, Pod, and Biologica; Jo to support and gradually take on more responsibility](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

  - [Limit kickoff meeting attendees to reduce client overwhelm and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/qMEyz7g7kT2BFRnbSs2SWzH_HcoxEJYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
